commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an operation-aware outbound delivery resolver for text/poll sends, routes sendMessage/sendPoll/direct delivery/gateway poll through it, and adds QQBot reconnect pending-delivery drain hooks with regression tests.

PR surface: Source +147, Tests +650. Total +797 across 12 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: the linked issue supplies live QQBot 4009 reconnect logs, and current main still has shared/capability-blind resolver paths that can reach the reported `Outbound not configured` throw. I did not run a fresh live QQBot timeout in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No narrow automation repair remains; maintainers need to decide whether to accept the compatibility and QQBot replay-timing changes before merge.
